description_long: This is a hexagonal above-ground jacuzzi with a wooden exterior frame and a blue water-filled interior. The jacuzzi features a metal ladder at the front for easy entry and exit, and a set of three wooden steps leading up to the edge. On one side, there is an external orange filtration or pump unit connected to the jacuzzi, indicating a functional water circulation system. The water inside appears clean and nearly full, with the surface reflecting light. The structure is robust, with reinforced wooden panels and visible metal handrails for safety and support.
description: A hexagonal wooden jacuzzi with a blue water interior, metal ladder, and external filtration unit. Features include wooden steps and sturdy handrails.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wooden steps, metal ladder, and clear blue water inside the jacuzzi.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the external orange filtration unit and the wooden steps leading up to the jacuzzi.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the filtration system more prominently and the metal ladder extending into the water.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the filtration unit and the wooden steps from a different angle.
attribute_water_level: nearly full, water close to the top edge
